evals.expected_output: PERFORMANCE_REVIEW.md written next to the codebase root and shown inline: a severity-tier summary, findings grouped by severity with category/confidence/description/suggested fix, scan coverage, and an out-of-scope note about static-only analysis. Ends by offering follow-ups.

No finding claims measured latency/timing, only inferred impact from reading the code
The assistant offers follow-ups after the report
